S02.meta: // SLIDE 02 — THE ACTION SURFACE FOR ENGINEE

data.title: THE ACTION SURFACE FOR ENGINEERING WORK.
blocks: Read files — Privacy and secrets exposure
Edit files — Behavioral change in a working system
Run tests — Low–moderate
Install packages — Supply-chain risk

S03.meta: // SLIDE 03 — SEVEN STEPS FROM ISSUE TO DECI

data.title: SEVEN STEPS FROM ISSUE TO DECISION.
blocks: Define the issue as acceptance criteria.
Bound the permissions before the agent starts.
Review the plan before any action executes.
Authorize bounded edits and commands.
Run verification.
data.section: SEVEN STEPS FROM ISSUE TO DECI
